Adds an Active Hybrid GraphRAG subsection to the v13 Dream section, keeping it as supporting Dream/Brain evidence rather than the release headline. The section now explains the active frontier mechanics, ties the Agent OS back to Neo data/state/class primitives, adds a Mermaid mechanism diagram, and quotes the current generated Golden Path snapshot from `resources/content/sandman_handoff.md` with a proof-not-prophecy caveat.

Evidence: L1 (static source/doc audit + release-note diff) -> L1 required (documentation-only close target). No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket

- Used the raw Golden Path snapshot as a quote, with an explicit caveat that it is generated, inspectable, and challengeable rather than hand-polished release prose.
- Preserved the existing Dream loop diagram and placed the new Active Hybrid GraphRAG mechanism after the Golden Path boundary guardrail to avoid a diagram dump.
